properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There may be storms That will move out the way And trials will come To only test my faith

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What I've learned about Your favor Your mercy and Your grace Is they go on forever They're sufficient for today

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I'm worried about tomorrow I won't be overwhelmed And the burdens that I've carried I will choose to lay them down

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 'Cause what I've learned about Your favor Your mercy and Your grace Is they go on forever They're sufficient for today

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah They're sufficient for today And hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah They're sufficient for today

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: In the joy and in the sorrow I find You just the same And behind my darkest mornings There's a peace I can't explain

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I'm so grateful for Your favor Your mercy and Your grace 'Cause they go on forever They're sufficient for today

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah They're sufficient for today Hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah They're sufficient for today

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: One day I'll finally see You And my faith will be my sign And all my present suffering Will be gone and left behind

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: I'll be standing in Your favor Your mercy and Your grace 'Cause they go on forever They still go on forever Oh, they still go on forever All glory to Your name

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: /: Hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah All glory to Your name :/

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah They're sufficient for today And hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah They're sufficient for today
